divergences.decision: SDK-to-worker bootstrap uses protobuf service/message contracts as the transport contract for shared-memory registration and client-worker coordination.
divergences.detail: The PR reuses RegisterClientRspPb field 24, changing it from int32 log_rate_limit to LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config. That is an incompatible protobuf wire-contract change on the SDK-to-worker registration response. The PR's own added log-sampler design text says field 24 should be reserved and log_sample_config should use field 25, but the actual source hunk uses field 24.
divergences.evidence: src/datasystem/protos/share_memory.proto @@ RegisterClientRspPb: int32 log_rate_limit = 24 -> LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config = 24; contrasted with .repo_context/modules/infra/logging/log-sampler-design.md added protobuf example reserving 24 and using 25
divergences.fix: Reserve field 24 and add LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config on a new field number such as 25, then update generated usage/tests/docs accordingly; if an intentional incompatible wire break is required, update the mental model/ADR with that compatibility decision before merging.
